description: Case dimensions: 25 mm x 20 mm Case thickness: 6 mmDial shape: RectangularWarranty: 1yrSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortBlue leather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and styleSilver coloured dial with branding at the 3 hour mark and brand logo near the 7 hour mark Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 30 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands, in light rain etc.
